message.content:
@startuml
participant "Client" as Client
participant "Target" as Target
participant "Adaptor" as Adaptor
participant "Adaptee" as Adaptee

Client uses Target

Target extends Adaptor

Adaptor has Adaptee

Target targetMethod1 : ??
Target targetMethod2 : ??

Adaptor adaptee: Adaptee
Adaptor targetMethod1() : ??
Adaptor targetMethod2() : ??

Adaptee methodA() : ??
Adaptee methodB() : ??
Adaptee methodC() : ??

@enduml
